text: Implement a more granular and context-aware importance scoring system, specifically focusing on recent, high-impact events and critical dependencies. This will ensure the agent prioritizes rewriting only the most relevant and crucial code changes, avoiding unnecessary rework and reducing the risk of introducing new errors.
reason: This improves the plan by directly addressing the identified weakness in importance scoring. By focusing on recent, impactful events, the agent will more effectively refine its own plan, ensuring efficient and targeted rewriting. This also aligns with the consolidation pattern, as it consolidates changes into a single, focused update.
